tests.name: folkrace_driver.py eksisteerib
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, sys; files=[f for f in glob.glob('**/folkrace_driver.py', recursive=True) if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(0 if files else 1)"

tests.name: Python suuntaks on korrektne
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, ast, sys; files=[f for f in glob.glob('**/folkrace_driver.py', recursive=True) if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(1) if not files else ast.parse(open(files[0]).read())"

tests.name: Impordid on olemas (LaserScan, Twist)
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, sys; files=[f for f in glob.glob('**/folkrace_driver.py', recursive=True) if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(1) if not files else None; code=open(files[0]).read(); sys.exit(0 if 'LaserScan' in code and 'Twist' in code else 1)"

tests.name: Lidar lugemine implementeeritud (front ei ole 8.0 stub)
Vasaku ja parema lidari lugemine implementeeritud
Reaktiivne loogika olemas (linear.x ja angular.z aktiivses koodis)
package.xml ja setup.py on korras
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, sys; px=glob.glob('**/package.xml', recursive=True); sp=glob.glob('**/setup.py', recursive=True); px=[f for f in px if not f.startswith('.github')]; sp=[f for f in sp if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(0 if px and sp else 1)"

tests.name: Kood ei sisalda lahendamata TODO-sid pealoogikas
